category_sources: source_facts.description says it interacts with Gitea instances with MCP.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives gitea-mcp-server; source_facts.homepage points to the official Gitea gitea-mcp project.
docs_sources: Official Gitea project page is the best available documentation surface for this MCP server.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive both identify gitea.com/gitea/gitea-mcp as the official source project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Gitea and MCP integration; source_facts.executables shows the command-line server executable.
